---
title: "Grizzly Peak Loop"
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const title = document.querySelector(".quarto-title h1.title");
  if (!title) {
    return;
  }
  title.innerHTML = title.textContent.replace(
    /(\d+% Gravel)/g,
    '<span style="color: chocolate;">$1</span>',
  );
});
</script>
```



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="13.91" data-elevation="1747.70" data-time="95" data-road-quality="78" data-has-gravel="false">
<div class="mobile-route-heading">

<div class="mobile-route-tags"><span class="mobile-route-tag">Spruce ↑</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Grizzly Peak ↑</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Claremont ↓</span></div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>13.91</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1747.7 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~1:40</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.17 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">78%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Map

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/overview_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>6.43</td>
      <td>46.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.92</td>
      <td>21.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.06</td>
      <td>15.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>1.67</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.66</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.17</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,590</td>
      <td>6.3</td>
      <td>57 ± 24</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Virginia Street (3% avg)</td>
      <td>203</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>8 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Spruce Street (7% avg)</td>
      <td>291</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>10 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (4% avg)</td>
      <td>479</td>
      <td>2.1</td>
      <td>17 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (5% avg)</td>
      <td>220</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>344</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (2% avg)</td>
      <td>53</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,590</td>
      <td>13.9</td>
      <td>95 ± 34</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Virginia Street (3% avg)</td>
      <td>203</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>8 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Spruce Street (7% avg)</td>
      <td>291</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>10 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (4% avg)</td>
      <td>479</td>
      <td>2.1</td>
      <td>17 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (5% avg)</td>
      <td>220</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>344</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (2% avg)</td>
      <td>53</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>6.9</td>
      <td>34</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>37.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>16.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
      <td>15.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>9.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>7.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>5.6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
